title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
##### Designation of Transparency Officer under the Right to Information Act, 2005 in the IDBI Bank Ltd.
In pursuance of the Central Information Commission’s directive dated November 15, 2010 issued to all Public Authorities under the powers vested in the Central Information Commission under Section 19 (8) (a) of The Right to Information Act, 2005, Shri Shalil Mukund Awale, Executive Director, is designated as the Transparency Officer.
Shri Shalil Mukund Awale Executive Director IDBI Bank Limited, IDBI Tower, Cuffe Parade, WTC Complex, Mumbai – 400 005. Tel. : 022-22152627 Email :
